name: AI Supabase File Chat Agent
description: Lists storage buckets and files from Supabase, lets users ask questions about their stored data, Claude AI analyzes the file inventory and answers questions, then posts the response to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: AI agent to chat with files in Supabase Storage

supabaseKey.description: Supabase connection key for accessing storage

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting responses

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the file analysis

projectRef.description: Supabase project reference ID (20-char string from project URL)

question.description: Question to ask about the Supabase storage files (e.g. 'What types of files are stored?', 'How is the storage organized?')

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for file chat
Run Claude AI to answer file question
Parse Claude AI output and strip fences
Post file chat response to Slack
